policy: Current owner-admin wallet balance detected on the live replacement token. Lock it unless you intentionally need a small liquid admin reserve.
Legacy deployer-operator wallet balance detected on the live replacement token. Lock it or consolidate it after reviewing whether this wallet still needs operational KPL.
Treasury reserve detected from the live replacement contract. Keep spending policy separate from owner control.
Ecosystem wallet balance detected from the live replacement contract. Use only for grants, incentives, or ecosystem programs.
One-year cliff from the post-migration reset, then three-year linear vesting.
Pure timelock for future liquidity decisions on the live replacement token.
Marketing wallet balance detected from the live replacement contract. Release gradually against a disclosed monthly budget.
Placeholder generated from controlled.addresses.txt and the migration snapshot. Review beneficiary, start date, duration, and whether this holder should instead be consolidated before live execution.
